{{Quote|We probably would have won if Trevor wasn't sick with nerf-pox.|Dashé Borreno|<ref name="HNN 50">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|news/1344_6.html|Legislative Youth Program Role-Plays Vote}}</ref>}}
'''Trevor Insevade''' was an [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Legislative Youth Program/Legends|Legislative Youth Program]] during the beginning of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Insevade missed the annual mock [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] session on [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] due to having [[nerf-pox]]. [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] delegate [[Dashé Borreno]] believed he would have voted against the mock [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]].

{{Char-stub}}
